name: CRE Investor Discovery
description:
Filter commercial properties along any US road corridor by property type and lot size, then get verified owner contacts in one query. Delivers the core Reonomy workflow at $0.10/response.

Features:
- Corridor and lot-size filter across 600M+ parcel records from OpenAddresses, state/county GIS, and ATTOM bulk data
- 50-state LLC/Trust/Individual entity resolution via Secretary of State bulk CSV filings and GLEIF API with nested graph traversal
- Nationwide portfolio graph: every parcel linked to its owner entity across all states
- B2B contact enrichment via Proxycurl (primary) and Hunter.io (fallback), cached 30 days per entity
- All four layers pre-ingested: no upstream calls at query time, p95 under 1.3 seconds on cache hit

Try asking:
- "Find retail property owners along Highway 9 in New Jersey with lots over 1 acre and get me their contact info"
- "Who owns commercial properties on Route 1 in California? Show me all property types"
- "Compare owners on I-95 corridor in Connecticut vs Massachusetts for industrial properties over 2 acres"
- "Find office building owners on Wilshire Boulevard in Los Angeles with lot size between 0.5 and 3 acres and portfolio over 5 properties"
- "Look up the owner of 1240 Highway 9 Woodbridge NJ, then pull their full nationwide portfolio and contact details"
- "I have an LLC name that might have changed: find all entities matching Smith Capital in New Jersey"
- "Find the top 10 largest lot retail owners along US-1 in New Jersey, ranked by total portfolio square footage, and show loan maturities expiring before 2026"

Agent tips:
- Start with investor_discovery to get owner entity_ids, then call owner_profile for the full profile on any owner you want to pursue
- Use parcel_lookup for a known address to find the owner_entity_id without running a full corridor scan
- Contact enrichment is async on first miss: contact_status of pending means re-query in 60 seconds
